## How tested

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --exclude rustral-wgpu-backend`
- [ ] (optional) `cargo test -p rustral-wgpu-backend`

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible
- [ ] Docs / README touched if behavior changed
